headline: Masters AI Experience Launch Could Be A Game Changer For International Business Machines (IBM)
summary: Earlier in March 2026, IBM and the Masters Tournament expanded their 30-year collaboration by rolling out new watsonx AI-powered fan experiences, including an interactive Masters Vault video archive and enhanced real-time Hole Insights across Masters digital platforms. These features showcase IBM’s Granite small language models and agentic watsonx Orchestrate tools in a high-visibility sports setting, turning decades of golf data and video into conversational, personalized insights for...
